entry.title: 10 Claude Prompts That Actually Work for Code Review
entry.summary: Practical Claude prompt templates for code review that catch real bugs, security issues, and performance problems. Tested across Python, JavaScript, and Go.

entry.title: Claude vs GPT-4 for Different Tasks: Honest Comparison
entry.summary: Side-by-side comparison of Claude and GPT-4 across coding, writing, analysis, and creative tasks with real examples and honest assessments.
